arguments.argument: The AI tool can enhance research by offering preliminary summaries, allowing scholars to build upon these with deeper analysis. To ensure justice, guidelines will be implemented to prevent unfair advantages and maintain research quality. This approach supports academic progress while preserving traditional values.
